feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Truly don’t understand how you can still be a Zelda fan when this gem usurped ev…
entry.content: Truly don’t understand how you can still be a Zelda fan when this gem usurped every facet of design >actual combat and weapon variety >actual story that’s well told >packed with content but never feels bloated because you’re always going to new locations >brush techniques (Zelda items) actually have use inside and outside of dungeons >stunning visual design that holds up 20 years later >great music >respects folklore in a genuine way, weaves together countless Japanese myths in a coherent and me

entry.title: /news/ News: ICE’s detention policy won at the 5th Circuit. Then judges found another way to reject it.
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/news/2026/ 06/13/ice-mandatory-detention-rulin gs-5th-circuit-00960621 When a federal appeals court in February endorsed ICE’s unprecedented policy to detain — without bond — thousands of immigrants with established roots in the U.S., the Trump administration celebrated it as a landmark win. The Feb. 6 ruling by the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals cut against the overwhelming rejection of ICE’s new detention policy by federal district courts around the country. And because

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Iron Lung: $4-5 million budget, $51.2 million box office >Backrooms: $10 millio…
entry.content: >Iron Lung: $4-5 million budget, $51.2 million box office >Backrooms: $10 million budget, $262.3 million box office >Obsession: $700,000 budget, $286.5 million budget Are we experiencing a bubble when it comes to youtuber horror movies? Are companies just going to throw money at literally any youtuber with even a little bit of relevance? The fuck is going on?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Please China DO NOT heist a copy of Mythos
entry.content: Imagine how much it will hurt the profits of our corporations. We cannot have filthy peasants using cheaper intelligent models instead of their biological brains. They need to work hard to play hard. Imagine how much it will hurt the reptilian loosh farm. Please do not wake up sleeper agents to heist a copy of Mythos and use it to train cheaper models, that will be very wong.

entry.title: /news/ News: Diesel mechanics queue up for Trump pardons
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/news/2026/ 06/13/clean-air-act-diesel-pardon-t rump-00960608 Troy Lake offered a stunning confession during dinner with his new neighbor, Wyoming political consultant Jeff Daugherty: Lake would soon report to a federal prison. Daugherty was stunned again when he learned Lake’s crime was conspiring to violate the Clean Air Act, a felony. The Justice Department and EPA said Lake, a mechanic and small business owner, had disabled pollution control monitors on hundreds of co

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /cyoar/ - Choose Your Own Adventure Refugee Thread
entry.content: CYOA Refuge Thread - A thread for posting any and all CYOAs unpostable in /tg/'s /cyoag/ (and occasionally ones that aren't). Previous thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83306272 Alternative link: https://archived.moe/trash/83306272 Worksafe threads: >>>/tg/cyoa /cyoag/'s CYOA archives and related resources: >https://rentry.co/cyoag Includes - but is not limited to - a F.A.Q. section and the personal archives of a number of authors. >https://cyoa.allsync.com/s/owWor64 yLTngDk3 An exte

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Do you feel like you want to kiss a girl or boy and have sex with them?
entry.content: I defeated my auto-eroticsm, I'm fully asexual and aromantic. I wonder "Do you want to be a neet forever or have a wife and children?" I really don't have romantic and sexual feelings for anyone. I used to admire some girls and boys at school, I looked at them, people thought I was a weirdo but class was boring. I was never straight. Like, I'm Asexual but I'm not part of LGBT community because I'm a neet boy who is just not straight.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Porsche Taycan
entry.content: Was this car simply ahead of its time? I think Porsche bet too much and too early on EVs when they should've launched the Taycan around this time. After the blunders of Ferrari and others, I think Porsche got too little credit for what a great car this was, albeit initially plagued with baby illnesses.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: RbC
entry.content: Raped by Corvette, as the cool kids say.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Any general opinions on this car-- 1998 Nissan Stagea 260RS Autec? It's up for s…
entry.content: Any general opinions on this car-- 1998 Nissan Stagea 260RS Autec? It's up for sale and easily googled from the dealership name in photo. Very unusual, seems cool in some ways, clearly modded, but tastefully, or poorly?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Indian place I occasionally eat at pretty much exclusively plays Bollywood s…
entry.content: The Indian place I occasionally eat at pretty much exclusively plays Bollywood stuff from the 70s and 80s, and even though I don't understand a word of it I have to admit a lot of this shit really slaps. I don't even know any specific singers or songs but lately I'll just go on Youtube and put on a playlist and just vibe.

entry.title: /news/ News: Early results show Swiss voters reject right-wing’s bid to cap population at 10 million
entry.content: https://apnews.com/article/switzerl and-referendum-population-10-millio n-03b42363567cfa9ff29c0995bb4ff711 GENEVA (AP) — Voters in Switzerland have cast their final ballots on Sunday on an initiative championed by the top right-wing party to cap the rich Alpine country’s population at 10 million. Early results showed Swiss voters were leaning against it. The populist Swiss People’s Party, which has the most seats in parliament, has stirred up and fostered anti-migration sentiment over the years,

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is there a good place to get legit seat belt extenders? These chintzy ones on sc…
entry.content: Is there a good place to get legit seat belt extenders? These chintzy ones on scamazon look like they'll break in a crash and send me through the windshield. I don't wanna hear that fucking chime every time I start the car or feel like taking my belt off.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2845
entry.content: >Extra Stream Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83436718 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >I'd like to play a game, or more accurately, i'd like you to play a game. The v…
entry.content: >I'd like to play a game, or more accurately, i'd like you to play a game. The video game industry has experienced unprecedented lay offs and financial failures from a wave of economic terrorism, /v/ >For years you've been collecting games on sale, denying publishers their rightful money, and then letting these games rot in a digital library untouched. And don't think I missed your video game piracy, costing the industry trillions of dollars in lost revenue. >I've presented you a choice. Finish

entry.title: /int/ International: I graduated from university last month

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How to make a true sonic advance 4 sequel >make sonic automatically attack enemi…
entry.content: How to make a true sonic advance 4 sequel >make sonic automatically attack enemies when he run very fast to preserve flow >give sonic a 2 hits health system to preserve difficulty. Make him recover 1 heart when he gets a certain amount of rings >Give sonic new tricks like the ability to carry enemies along with you and use them like skateboards >bring back humans and hubworlds in 2d format >forget about boost entirely and design around momentum >bring back and refine shadow the hedgehog's story

entry.title: /b/ Random: Recently ended a 20+ year friendship
entry.content: I've known this guy for 20 years. We now live relatively far apart so we didn't hang out much in person, mostly just talk on the phone or watch tv together on Discord. Within the past 2-3 years this has become something we do 5 or 6 times a week. For context I work from home and my hours are unusual. I get off work at 10pm. He doesn't work (lives on the government tit) but he does have to get up early to take his kids to school. So he calls me one night at 11 pm and I tell him sorry, I haven't f

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I invented computer case concept
entry.content: I call it "The Combine" situation 1: you need one mATX you buy one of these situation 2: things have changed and ou need full ATX solution: buy another of the same case you already had! step 1 in combinig: -remove side panels -remove top and bottom step 2: -attach the case on top of another -pull out "tall steel side panel" that comes with one case as an additional unused item -attach tall panels to both sides (you hace 2 of them because one come with one case but they are useless until you have

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Siri For Older iPhones
entry.content: Apple Devs mentioned that the Siri AI is available for iPhone 15 and later devices and we can use iCloud+ Subscription to use it more on Apple’s Private Cloud Compute (PCC). So if it can run some functions on Private Cloud why not for people with older device? Or will Apple make it compatible with older devices on upcoming beta updates? Also, I noticed that other Phone companies have these features in phones that are way less powerful than iPhone 11 (Which is a oldest device support iOS 27) I te
